falsificationQueries: Does canary evidence show central actor loss under current L3?
falsificationAttempts.falsificationAnalysis: Canary documents unresolved over-abstraction of central political actors and only records expected effect from patch, not validated pass.

falsificationAttempts.targetDescription: h_A2_001 hard invariants are sufficient gate
falsificationQueries: Do current artifacts show perfect retention/invariant behavior?
Is broader calibration complete enough to rely only on automated gates?
falsificationAttempts.falsificationAnalysis: Observed minor retention misses and unresolved calibration caveats weaken confidence but do not invalidate invariant-gating as a core policy.

falsificationAttempts.targetDescription: h_A3_001 L3 default gate policy condition currently met
falsificationQueries: Are A1/A2/B/Swap gate checks fully completed and logged?
Does v3 checklist indicate gate completion?
falsificationAttempts.falsificationAnalysis: Gate conditions remain planned/TODO in specs, so conditional claim is not yet supported in current state.

overallOutcome: Mixed (1 weakened, 2 failed in current state)
